title: AWS S3 and Storage Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Amazon S3 object storage.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Amazon S3 (Simple Storage Service)'?
options: Providing reliable and scalable object storage in the cloud—such as for images and backup files

questions.question: In AWS S3, what is a storage unit or container—such as for a project's images—commonly called?
